description: Defines and manages all canonical identifier schemes used across the platform. All module-scoped and artifact-scoped identifiers are issued and validated through this module. No other module may define its own identifier primitives.
forbidden_responsibilities: Artifact model schemas — those are owned by shared.artifact_models
Lineage records — those are owned by shared.lineage
Provenance records — those are owned by shared.provenance
Evaluation logic — that belongs to control_plane.evaluation
